_docs.url: Absolute https URLs point at games hosted on their own origins (each game repo's GitHub Pages). Relative URLs ('platformer/') resolve against the console's own address for locally-served cartridges. Any page built with @opencontrol/sdk works — plug and play.
_docs.profile: Must match the game's OpenControl.host({ controller }) option.
_docs.note: An HTTPS console can only embed HTTPS games (mixed content).
